replays.title: Replay bundle: post-state mismatch
replays.summary: Replay diverged from the locked post-state surface.

replays.title: Replay bundle: visibility leak
replays.summary: A hidden fact became visible outside the observation frame.

replays.title: Replay bundle: belief conflict
replays.summary: The replay wrote a belief that conflicted with locked witness evidence.

replays.title: Replay bundle: capability violation
replays.summary: The actor attempted an action outside the locked capability set.

replays.title: Replay bundle: inactive rule use
replays.summary: The replay used a world rule that was locked inactive in the snapshot.

replays.title: Replay bundle: plot obligation missed
replays.summary: A setup obligation stayed unresolved past its locked payoff point.

replays.title: Replay bundle: policy drift
replays.summary: Replay inputs drifted onto a different policy surface than the locked run.

replays.title: Replay bundle: state drift
replays.summary: The replay mutated a state surface from an out-of-date relationship baseline.

replays.title: Replay bundle: contract mismatch
replays.summary: A required bundle field was missing from the exported replay contract.

replays.title: Replay bundle: mechanism missing
replays.summary: The replay lacked a supporting mechanism needed to verify the intended payoff.
